categories.core_runtime: Base Godot runtime and tree coordination primitives.
categories.data_resource: Data-bearing resource or external configuration surface.
categories.gameplay_entity: World actor or interactive entity participating in gameplay.
categories.manager: Global or shared coordinator for flow, state, services, or resources.
categories.physics: Collision, movement, trigger, or physics participation.
categories.presentation: Visual, audio, camera, or animation presentation support.
categories.ui_element: Player-facing interface element or UI layer.
